title: Support parameterized virtual interaces (#4047)
body:
It fixes https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/4047.
I noticed that sometimes an interface that is used is marked as `dead`. Such situation happens on the example provided in https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/4286. I also found code that seems to be a workaround for that problem, but it doesn't cover the case from #4286:
https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/feae9ca4aac4e0ede4af718e80aaed460b998936/src/V3LinkDot.cpp#L826-L827
I decided to leave it as it is for now, because it seems to be a separate problem.
